title: Senior Software Engineer - Ola Cabs - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Ola Cabs - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Ola Cabs in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ola Cabs:
Ola Cabs is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs!
